simple_types.name: File_Status_T
simple_types.code:
type File_Status_T is
  (Success, Status_Error, Mode_Error, Name_Error, Use_Error, Device_Error,
   End_Error, Data_Error, …,
   Standard_Program_Error);

subprograms.name: Close
subprograms.code:
procedure Close (File   : in out File_T;
                 Status :    out File_Status_T)

subprograms.name: End_Of_File
subprograms.code: function End_Of_File (File : in File_T) return Boolean

New_Line

procedure New_Line (File    : in File_T;
                    Spacing : in Positive)
